params.tag_line: A blog for all the coding enthusiasts
params.about_text:
Welcome to Sunny Sphere 👋

This blog is proudly owned and managed by Sunny Chawla, created with the aim of sharing knowledge and real experiences in the field of programming and technology.

I am a passionate learner and developer who believes that the best way to grow in tech is by building real-world projects and learning from mistakes.

Through this platform, I share:

Coding tutorials
Web development insights
Project experiences
Career guidance for students

My goal is to make learning simple, practical, and accessible for everyone who wants to start or grow in the tech world.

🚀 Keep learning, keep building, and never stop improving!
